changeSet.author: msd
changeSet.comment:
Epic 07 / #116: per-notebook AI generation context.
One row per notebook holding the budget-fit context items (rolled up to the 8 KiB / 10-item generation budget by the summary service), the roll-up summary string, and a count of how many raw cell histories fed the last build.
Lives in the 'notebooks' schema as a sub-resource of a notebook. No cross-domain FK on notebook_id/owner_id: the notebooks domain is kept free of DB coupling so it can move to a NoSQL store later (api/docs/domain-boundaries.md §4); ownership/existence is enforced in the service layer.
